payload.text: First research pass: ingested the market-structure primer into two concept pages (market-structure-shift, displacement) and accepted one strategy proposal, ms-shift-spy-v1 (ms_shift family, SPY+QQQ, lifecycle research) — hypothesis killed if walk-forward Sharpe < 1.0 after costs. Open question: displacement needs a quantitative definition; the proposal uses range >= 1.5x 20-day ATR as the starting point, untested.
